title: Swift Ghasts
description: Upgrade ghast harnesses using smithing tables to make happy ghasts faster.
body:
![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8a08d67081c58fc25fe046d794f835e0ece3cad.webp)

This datapack or mod allows you to upgrade ghast harnesses using a upgrade template and wind charge in a smithing table, increacing the speed of the ghast wearing it by 100%.
